page_content: Zyro Dynamics Pvt. Ltd. Company Profile Doc Code: ZDL-CORP-001 Confidential — For Internal Use Only Page 1 Zyro Dynamics Pvt. Ltd. Navigate the Future Company Profile Document Code ZDL-CORP-001 Version V.01 Effective Date 01 April 2025 Document Owner Corporate Communications COMPANY OVERVIEW is a product-based enterprise software company headquartered in the United States. Founded in 2014 by Lamine Yamal and Aitana Bonmati, the company was built on a single conviction: that organisations of all sizes deserved intelligent, intuitive software that could grow with them. What started as a 12-person startup building HR automation tools has grown into a 4,500-strong company with a presence across India, the Middle East, and North America. The company's name is inspired by Zyro, a symbol of innovation and dynamic growth.

The company's name is inspired by Zyro, a symbol of innovation and dynamic growth. It reflects the company's ambition to be a guiding light in enterprise technology, and its commitment to helping organisations navigate complexity with clarity and confidence. Zyro Dynamics operates exclusively in the B2B SaaS segment, serving mid-sized and large enterprises across industries including financial services, healthcare, manufacturing, and professional services. As of April 2025, the company's products are used by over 1,200 enterprise clients across 28 countries.

Zyro Dynamics Pvt. Ltd. Company Profile Doc Code: ZDL-CORP-001 Confidential — For Internal Use Only Page 2 AT A GLANCE Attribute Details Legal Name Zyro Dynamics Pvt. Ltd. Founded 2014 Headquarters 350 Fifth Avenue, New York, NY 10118, USA Company Type Private Limited — Product-Based SaaS Industry Enterprise Software / B2B SaaS Total Employees Approximately 4,500 (as of April 2025) Active Clients 1,200+ enterprise clients across 28 countries Tagline Navigate the Future Website www.zyrodyn amics.com OUR PRODUCTS Zyro Dynamics offers a suite of four integrated enterprise SaaS products. Each product is built on a shared data platform, allowing organisations to run them independently or as a unified suite. Product Description Primary Users

Product Description Primary Users ZyroHR End-to-end human resources management platform covering payroll, leave, performance, onboarding, and compliance HR teams, employees, finance ZyroCRM Customer relationship management platform for sales pipeline tracking, lead management, and account analytics Sales, account management ZyroInsight Business intelligence and analytics platform with real-time dashboards, custom reports, and predictive models Data analysts, leadership ZyroDesk IT service management and employee helpdesk platform with ticketing, asset tracking, and SLA management IT teams, employees OFFICE LOCATIONS Location Office Type Address Headcount Global HQ Global Headquarters 350 Fifth Avenue, New York, NY 10118, USA ~2,800 Dev Centre Development Centre Remote / Distributed ~900 Support Hub Support and QA Hub Remote / Distributed ~500 Dubai, UAE Middle East Office

Zyro Dynamics Pvt. Ltd. Company Profile Doc Code: ZDL-CORP-001 Confidential — For Internal Use Only Page 3 LEADERSHIP TEAM Name Designation Background Lamine Yamal Chief Executive Officer and Co-Founder Visionary technologist with 18 years of experience in enterprise software. Drives overall company strategy, investor relations, and global expansion. Aitana Bonmati Chief Technology Officer and Co-Founder Architect of the Zyro shared data platform. Expert in distributed systems and cloud-native infrastructure with 16 years in product engineering. Toni Kroos Chief Financial Officer Former CFO of two publicly listed SaaS companies. Oversees financial planning, risk management, and the company's profitability roadmap. Marta Chief People Officer Champion of culture, talent strategy, and employee experience. Leads HR, L&D;, and the workplace transformation agenda across all offices. Casemiro

Champion of culture, talent strategy, and employee experience. Leads HR, L&D;, and the workplace transformation agenda across all offices. Casemiro VP, Sales and Business Development Responsible for enterprise sales, channel partnerships, and market expansion across South Asia, the Middle East, and North America. Sam Kerr VP, Customer Success Owns the post-sales journey including implementation, support, renewals, and strategic account growth for all 1,200+ enterprise clients. MISSION, VISION AND VALUES Mission To build intelligent software that empowers organisations to work smarter, move faster, and grow sustainably. Vision To become the most trusted enterprise SaaS platform used by 10,000 organisations across 50 countries by 2030. Core Values Integrity: We conduct ourselves with honesty and transparency in everything we do.

Core Values Integrity: We conduct ourselves with honesty and transparency in everything we do. Excellence: We hold ourselves to high standards in every product we build and every commitment we make. Collaboration: We believe the best outcomes come from diverse teams working together with mutual respect. Innovation: We encourage curiosity, challenge assumptions, and reward creative problem-solving. Empathy: We listen carefully to our customers and colleagues and treat everyone with dignity.

Acrux Dynamics Pvt. Ltd. Employee Handbook Doc Code: ADL-HR-001 Confidential — For Internal Use Only Page 1 Acrux Dynamics Pvt. Ltd. HITEC City, Hyderabad, Telangana 500081 Navigate the Future Employee Handbook Document Code ADL-HR-001 Version V.03 Effective Date 01 April 2025 Document Owner HR Department INTRODUCTION Welcome to Acrux Dynamics Pvt. We are delighted to have you as part of our team and hope that your journey here will be rewarding, fulfilling, and full of growth. Acrux Dynamics is a product-based software company headquartered in HITEC City, Hyderabad. Founded in 2014 by Lamine Yamal and Aitana Bonmati, we have grown from a 12-person startup to over 4,500 employees across India, the Middle East, and North America.

Founded in 2014 by Lamine Yamal and Aitana Bonmati, we have grown from a 12-person startup to over 4,500 employees across India, the Middle East, and North America. Our flagship products, AcruxHR, AcruxCRM, AcruxInsight, and AcruxDesk, are trusted by enterprise clients across the United States, the United Kingdom, the Middle East, and Southeast Asia. This Employee Handbook is your first point of reference for understanding the policies, practices, and culture at Acrux Dynamics. Please read it thoroughly and keep it handy. For any queries, the HR team is always available to assist you. SCOPE AND APPLICABILITY This handbook applies to all employees of Acrux Dynamics Pvt. Ltd., including full-time permanent employees, employees serving their probation period, fixed-term contract employees, and interns or trainees.

Ltd., including full-time permanent employees, employees serving their probation period, fixed-term contract employees, and interns or trainees. Consultants and third-party contractors engaged through vendor agreements are governed by their respective service contracts and are not covered under this handbook unless specifically mentioned.

Acrux Dynamics Pvt. Ltd. Employee Handbook Doc Code: ADL-HR-001 Confidential — For Internal Use Only Page 2 MISSION, VISION AND VALUES Our Mission To build intelligent software that empowers organisations to work smarter, move faster, and grow sustainably. Our Vision To become the most trusted enterprise SaaS platform used by 10,000 organisations across 50 countries by 2030. Our Core Values Integrity: We conduct ourselves with honesty and transparency in all our dealings, internal and external. Excellence: We hold ourselves to high standards in every product we build and every commitment we make. Collaboration: We believe the best outcomes come from diverse teams working together with mutual respect. Innovation: We encourage curiosity, challenge assumptions, and reward creative problem-solving.

Innovation: We encourage curiosity, challenge assumptions, and reward creative problem-solving. Empathy: We listen carefully to our customers and our colleagues and treat everyone with dignity. Acrux Dynamics Pvt. Ltd. Employee Handbook Doc Code: ADL-HR-001 Confidential — For Internal Use Only Page 3 EMPLOYEE GRADE STRUCTURE Grade Level Typical Designation Experience Range L1 Trainee Software Trainee / Intern 0 to 1 year L2 Junior Junior Software Engineer 1 to 3 years L3 Mid-Level Software Engineer 3 to 5 years L4 Senior Senior Software Engineer 5 to 8 years L5 Lead Technical Lead / Team Lead 7 to 10 years L6 Manager Engineering Manager 8 to 12 years L7 Senior Manager Senior Manager 10 to 14 years L8 Director Director 12 to 16 years L9 Vice President VP 15 or more years L10 C-Suite CEO / CTO / CFO / CPO 20 or more years OFFICE LOCATIONS Location Office Type Address Strength Hyderabad Global HQ HITEC City, Hyderabad, Telangana 500081 ~2,800 Bengaluru Development Centre Whitefield, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560066 ~900 Chennai Support and QA Hub Tidel Park, Chennai, Tamil Nadu 600113

~2,800 Bengaluru Development Centre Whitefield, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560066 ~900 Chennai Support and QA Hub Tidel Park, Chennai, Tamil Nadu 600113 ~500 Dubai, UAE Middle East Office DIFC, Dubai, United Arab Emirates ~150 Austin, USA North America Office Downtown Austin, TX 78701, USA ~150 LEADERSHIP TEAM Name Designation Lamine Yamal Chief Executive Officer and Co-Founder Aitana Bonmati Chief Technology Officer and Co-Founder Toni Kroos Chief Financial Officer Marta Chief People Officer Casemiro Vice President, Sales and Business Development Sam Kerr Vice President, Customer Success WORKING HOURS AND ATTENDANCE Acrux Dynamics follows a five-day work week, Monday through Friday. Standard working hours are 9:30 AM to 6:30 PM IST, with a 30-minute unpaid lunch break. Employees are expected to complete a minimum of nine

Acrux Dynamics Pvt. Ltd. Employee Handbook Doc Code: ADL-HR-001 Confidential — For Internal Use Only Page 4 working hours each day. Flexible Working Hours Employees at grade L3 and above may opt for flexible working hours within a core band of 10:00 AM to 4:00 PM IST, subject to written approval from their reporting manager. All approved flexible working schedules must be documented through the AcruxHR portal. Attendance Attendance is recorded through biometric terminals at all office locations and through the AcruxHR mobile application for employees working remotely. Employees must mark their entry and exit each working day without exception. Three or more consecutive days of absent or unmarked attendance without a corresponding approved leave entry will trigger an escalation to the HR Business Partner. HR CONTACTS AND HELPDESK Purpose Contact / Email

HR CONTACTS AND HELPDESK Purpose Contact / Email General HR queries and employee services hr.helpdesk@acruxdynamics.com Payroll, salary, and reimbursement queries payroll@acruxdynamics.com Leave, attendance, documents (self-service) hrportal.acruxdynamics.com Grievances and complaints hr.grievance@acruxdynamics.com ICC / POSH related matters icc@acruxdynamics.com Whistleblower (anonymous) whistle.acruxdynamics.com

Zyro Dynamics Pvt. Ltd. Leave Policy Doc Code: ZDL-HR-002 Confidential — For Internal Use Only Page 1 Zyro Dynamics Pvt. Ltd. Navigate the Future Leave Policy Document Code ZDL-HR-002 Version V.04 Effective Date 01 April 2025 Document Owner HR Department INTRODUCTION We value the importance of finding a healthy balance between your professional and personal life, and we encourage you to make use of the leave entitlements available to you. We also recognise that emergencies and illness can arise without notice, and we fully understand and support that. At the same time, we request that you plan your leave thoughtfully and, where possible, align it with the operational needs of your team. The Company reserves the right to revise leave rules from time to time at its discretion. SCOPE AND APPLICABILITY

The Company reserves the right to revise leave rules from time to time at its discretion. SCOPE AND APPLICABILITY This policy applies to all Zyro Dynamics employees, including full-time permanent employees, fixed-term contract employees, probationary employees, interns, and consultants on the company payroll. Employees seconded from third-party vendors are governed by the terms of their respective contracts. Leave Cycle: Financial Year (01 April to 31 March)

Zyro Dynamics Pvt. Ltd. Leave Policy Doc Code: ZDL-HR-002 Confidential — For Internal Use Only Page 2 ANNUAL LEAVE ENTITLEMENT Leave Type Annual Entitlement Carry Forward Encashable Earned Leave (EL) 15 days (after 1 year); 1.25 days/month Up to 45 days Yes Casual Leave (CL) 8 days Not allowed Not applicable Sick Leave (SL) 10 days Not allowed Not applicable Maternity Leave 26 weeks Not applicable Not applicable Paternity Leave 10 days Not applicable Not applicable Bereavement Leave 5 days Not applicable Not applicable Marriage Leave 3 days (once in service) Not applicable Not applicable Compensatory Off As earned Up to 7 days (60-day window) Not applicable Loss of Pay (LOP) As needed Not applicable Not applicable LEAVE RULES AND GUIDELINES The following general rules apply to all leave types unless specifically stated otherwise:

LEAVE RULES AND GUIDELINES The following general rules apply to all leave types unless specifically stated otherwise: Casual Leave and Sick Leave are credited to the employee's leave balance on the first day of the following month, provided the employee has worked for a minimum of 20 days during the previous month. For employees joining or separating during the leave cycle, all leave will be calculated on a pro-rata basis. Casual Leave and Sick Leave cannot be carried forward to the next financial year, nor can they be encashed. Any balance remaining at the end of the financial year (31 March) will lapse automatically. Employees are not permitted to avail more than 2 consecutive days of Casual Leave. If additional days are required, they must be clubbed with Earned Leave.

If additional days are required, they must be clubbed with Earned Leave. Sick Leave taken for more than 2 consecutive days requires a Medical Certificate from a registered medical practitioner, to be submitted within 3 working days of returning to work. Leave cannot be availed during the notice period unless specifically approved by the reporting manager and HR. EARNED LEAVE (EL) Eligibility and Accrual Earned Leave is accrued based on the length of continuous service. Employees become eligible for 15 days of Earned Leave upon completion of one year of continuous service, provided they have worked for a minimum of 240 days in that year. Thereafter, Earned Leave accrues at the rate of 1.25 days per month. Employees in their probation period accrue EL at 0.5 days per month, which becomes available for use only after probation confirmation.

Employees in their probation period accrue EL at 0.5 days per month, which becomes available for use only after probation confirmation. Application and Approval Planned Earned Leave must be applied and approved at least 7 days in advance through the ZyroHR portal. All leave requests are subject to manager approval and business requirements. Retroactive EL applications will not be approved except in genuine emergencies, at the discretion of the reporting manager and HR.

Zyro Dynamics Pvt. Ltd. Leave Policy Doc Code: ZDL-HR-002 Confidential — For Internal Use Only Page 3 Carry Forward A maximum of 45 days of Earned Leave may be carried forward at the end of each financial year (31 March). Any balance exceeding this limit will be automatically encashed at the employee's basic daily rate and credited in the April payroll. Encashment Employees are eligible to encash up to 50% of their available Earned Leave balance once per financial year, subject to a minimum balance of 5 EL days being retained after encashment. The request must be raised through the ZyroHR portal. EL encashment is also permitted at the time of separation, for the full remaining balance. MATERNITY AND PATERNITY LEAVE Maternity Leave

EL encashment is also permitted at the time of separation, for the full remaining balance. MATERNITY AND PATERNITY LEAVE Maternity Leave Female employees who have completed a minimum of 80 days of service in the 12 months preceding the expected date of delivery are entitled to 26 weeks of paid Maternity Leave, in accordance with the Maternity Benefit (Amendment) Act, 2017. This entitlement applies to the first two live births. For a third child, the entitlement is 12 weeks. Up to 8 weeks of pre-natal leave may be availed prior to the expected delivery date. Provisions for surrogacy and adoption are handled on a case-by-case basis. Please contact the HR team for details. Paternity Leave

Provisions for surrogacy and adoption are handled on a case-by-case basis. Please contact the HR team for details. Paternity Leave Male employees and same-sex partners are entitled to 10 consecutive days of paid Paternity Leave, to be availed within 90 days of the birth or legal adoption of a child. This is a one-time entitlement per child and cannot be split. BEREAVEMENT AND MARRIAGE LEAVE Bereavement Leave Employees are entitled to 5 days of paid Bereavement Leave in the event of the death of an immediate family member. For this purpose, immediate family is defined as the employee's spouse, children, parents, parents-in-law, and siblings. Supporting documentation such as a death certificate may be requested by HR. Marriage Leave

Marriage Leave A one-time entitlement of 3 consecutive paid days is available for an employee's own marriage. This leave must be applied at least 2 weeks in advance and is available only once during the entire period of employment at Zyro Dynamics. COMPENSATORY OFF (CO) Employees who are required to work on a declared public holiday or on a Sunday due to a business requirement will be entitled to a Compensatory Off day. The CO must be availed within 60 calendar days of the date it was earned. CO days that are not availed within this window will lapse automatically. A maximum of 7 CO days may be accumulated at any time. LEAVE APPLICATION PROCESS All leave must be applied for through the ZyroHR portal prior to the leave date wherever possible.

LEAVE APPLICATION PROCESS All leave must be applied for through the ZyroHR portal prior to the leave date wherever possible. For unplanned absences such as Sick Leave or emergency Casual Leave, the application must be submitted on the same day of absence or the next working day at the latest. The reporting manager is required to review and action leave requests within one working day. Approved leave is automatically updated in the employee's leave balance

Zyro Dynamics Pvt. Ltd. Leave Policy Doc Code: ZDL-HR-002 Confidential — For Internal Use Only Page 4 record. PUBLIC HOLIDAYS Zyro Dynamics observes 10 public and restricted holidays per year. The annual holiday calendar is published by HR in the month of December for the following financial year and is available on the ZyroHR portal. Employees required to work on a declared public holiday are entitled to a Compensatory Off day as described above.

Zyro Dynamics Pvt. Ltd. Work From Home Policy Doc Code: ZDL-HR-003 Confidential — For Internal Use Only Page 1 Zyro Dynamics Pvt. Ltd. Navigate the Future Work From Home Policy Document Code ZDL-HR-003 Version V.02 Effective Date 01 March 2025 Document Owner HR Department and IT Infrastructure INTRODUCTION Zyro Dynamics recognises that flexible work arrangements are an important part of employee wellbeing, productivity, and retention. This policy establishes a structured and consistent framework for employees to work from a location other than their designated Zyro Dynamics office. The Company expects that all WFH arrangements will be exercised responsibly and that the quality and timeliness of work will not be compromised under any circumstances. SCOPE AND APPLICABILITY

SCOPE AND APPLICABILITY This policy applies to all permanent employees at grade L3 and above across all Zyro Dynamics office locations. Employees on probation, employees at grades L1 and L2, and employees deployed at client sites are not eligible for WFH arrangements unless approved in writing by the HR Director on a case-by-case basis.

Zyro Dynamics Pvt. Ltd. Work From Home Policy Doc Code: ZDL-HR-003 Confidential — For Internal Use Only Page 2 TYPES OF WFH ARRANGEMENTS Arrangement Description Eligibility Max Days/Week Hybrid WFH Fixed WFH days as agreed with reporting manager in writing L3 and above 3 days Full Remote Employee works entirely from a remote location, formally approved L5 and above, case-by-case 5 days Ad-hoc WFH Unplanned, single-day WFH requests for personal or minor health reasons L3 and above 2 days Emergency WFH Activated during declared emergencies, natural disasters, or health advisories All employees As directed by HR ELIGIBILITY CRITERIA To be considered for a WFH arrangement, an employee must satisfy all of the following at the time of the request: Completed a minimum of 6 months of continuous service at Zyro Dynamics. Currently holding grade L3 or above.

Completed a minimum of 6 months of continuous service at Zyro Dynamics. Currently holding grade L3 or above. Has received a performance rating of Meets Expectations or above in the most recent performance review cycle. Has no active Performance Improvement Plan or ongoing disciplinary proceedings. The nature of the role is assessed as suitable for remote execution by the reporting manager. A reliable internet connection with a minimum speed of 25 Mbps is available at the remote location, along with a dedicated, distraction-free workspace. APPROVAL PROCESS Employees must submit a WFH request through the ZyroHR portal under the Work Arrangements section at least 2 working days before the intended WFH date, except in the case of ad-hoc requests. The reporting manager must review and action the request within 1 working day.

The reporting manager must review and action the request within 1 working day. HR will verify eligibility for the first-time setup of a Hybrid or Full Remote arrangement. IT will ensure VPN access and any required equipment is ready before the arrangement commences. EMPLOYEE RESPONSIBILITIES WHILE WORKING FROM HOME Availability and Communication The employee must be fully available and responsive during agreed working hours. Absence from communication channels for more than 30 minutes during working hours without prior notice is treated as an attendance exception. Video must be enabled during all scheduled meetings and calls, unless explicitly waived by the meeting organiser. Status on company communication tools must accurately reflect actual availability at all times.

Zyro Dynamics Pvt. Ltd. Work From Home Policy Doc Code: ZDL-HR-003 Confidential — For Internal Use Only Page 3 Workspace and Equipment All work must be performed exclusively on the company-issued laptop. Personal devices must not be used for any work activity involving company or customer data. A dedicated workspace free from personal interruptions must be maintained during working hours. VPN must be active at all times when accessing Zyro Dynamics systems remotely. Confidentiality Confidential documents and screens must not be visible to family members or any third party. Printing of confidential or customer-related documents at home is strictly prohibited. The screen must be locked within 5 minutes of inactivity. EQUIPMENT AND SUPPORT Item Provided By Returned on Exit Laptop (standard configuration) IT Department Mandatory

EQUIPMENT AND SUPPORT Item Provided By Returned on Exit Laptop (standard configuration) IT Department Mandatory VPN credentials and access IT Department Revoked on last working day Microsoft 365 licence IT Department Deactivated on last working day Headset (one-time, on request) IT Department Not required Internet reimbursement — Rs.1,000/month (Full Remote L5+ only) Finance Not applicable Note: Full Remote employees at L5 and above must submit internet bills through the ZyroHR expense portal to claim the monthly reimbursement. NON-COMPLIANCE Failure to comply with this policy will be addressed progressively. A first instance of non-compliance will result in a verbal warning and suspension of WFH privilege for 30 days. A second instance will result in a written warning and suspension for 90 days.

A second instance will result in a written warning and suspension for 90 days. Repeated violations will lead to permanent revocation of WFH eligibility and may be escalated to the formal disciplinary process.

Zyro Dynamics Pvt. Ltd. Code of Conduct Doc Code: ZDL-HR-004 Confidential — For Internal Use Only Page 1 Zyro Dynamics Pvt. Ltd. Navigate the Future Code of Conduct Document Code ZDL-HR-004 Version V.02 Effective Date 01 January 2025 Document Owner Legal, Compliance and HR Department INTRODUCTION Zyro Dynamics is committed to conducting its business with the highest standards of honesty, integrity, and professionalism. This Code of Conduct defines the expected behaviour for all employees, contractors, consultants, and interns across every Zyro Dynamics location, and while representing the company externally. Adherence to this Code is a fundamental condition of employment. Employees are required to read, understand, and sign an acknowledgement of this Code at the time of joining. SCOPE AND APPLICABILITY This Code applies to all individuals employed by or associated with Zyro Dynamics Pvt.

SCOPE AND APPLICABILITY This Code applies to all individuals employed by or associated with Zyro Dynamics Pvt. Ltd., whether on a full-time, part-time, contract, or internship basis. It governs conduct at the workplace, at client sites, during official travel, at company-sponsored events, and in any digital or social media interaction that may be connected to the company. PROFESSIONAL CONDUCT Workplace Behaviour Every person at Zyro Dynamics has the right to work in an environment that is safe, respectful, and inclusive. The following standards are expected from all employees without exception:

Zyro Dynamics Pvt. Ltd. Code of Conduct Doc Code: ZDL-HR-004 Confidential — For Internal Use Only Page 2 Treat all colleagues, clients, vendors, and visitors with dignity and respect, regardless of their designation, gender, age, religion, nationality, sexual orientation, or disability. Maintain professional tone and language in all communications, whether verbal, written, electronic, or in person. Resolve workplace disagreements through respectful dialogue. Where a resolution cannot be reached, the matter should be escalated to the reporting manager or HR. Refrain from using offensive or discriminatory language, sharing inappropriate content, or engaging in any conduct that creates a hostile or uncomfortable environment. Accountability

Accountability Take ownership of your work and your commitments. Communicate proactively with your manager if a deadline or deliverable is at risk. Be punctual for work, meetings, and client engagements. Habitual tardiness without a valid reason is a disciplinary matter. CONFLICTS OF INTEREST A conflict of interest exists when an employee's personal interests, whether financial, professional, or personal, could influence or appear to influence their decisions or actions in their role at Zyro Dynamics. The following rules apply: Any real or potential conflict of interest must be disclosed in writing to the reporting manager and HR immediately upon becoming aware of it. Employees must not hold a financial interest in a competitor, customer, or supplier without prior written clearance from the Legal and Compliance team.

Employees must not hold a financial interest in a competitor, customer, or supplier without prior written clearance from the Legal and Compliance team. If an immediate family member is employed by a competitor or vendor of Zyro Dynamics, this must be disclosed to HR. Engaging in paid employment or consulting with another organisation while employed at Zyro Dynamics is not permitted without prior written approval from the Chief People Officer. CONFIDENTIALITY Employees are entrusted with confidential information as part of their day-to-day responsibilities. This includes customer and prospect data, product roadmaps, pricing, financial figures, HR records, business strategies, source code, and any information not publicly disclosed. Confidential information must not be shared with any person who does not have an authorised business need to access it.

Confidential information must not be shared with any person who does not have an authorised business need to access it. Company information must not be posted on social media, shared on personal devices, or disclosed to any media outlet. On exit from the company, all confidential documents, access credentials, and company-issued assets must be returned or deleted as directed by IT and HR. Violations of confidentiality may result in disciplinary action up to and including termination, and may attract civil or criminal liability under applicable law. Note: For detailed data classification and handling rules, refer to the IT and Data Security Policy — ZDL-IT-001.

Zyro Dynamics Pvt. Ltd. Code of Conduct Doc Code: ZDL-HR-004 Confidential — For Internal Use Only Page 3 GIFTS AND HOSPITALITY Scenario Permitted Condition Receiving a gift under Rs. 1,000 Yes Must be declared to the reporting manager Receiving a gift over Rs. 1,000 No Must be politely declined or surrendered to HR Client-hosted meal Yes Value must not exceed Rs. 3,000 per person Vendor-sponsored domestic travel No Requires prior written approval from the CFO Giving branded gifts to clients Yes Pre-approved by Finance; value under Rs. 2,000 per item Accepting cash from any party Never Immediate disciplinary action, zero tolerance SOCIAL MEDIA Employees are free to maintain personal social media accounts. However, the following rules must be observed when posting anything that could be connected to Zyro Dynamics:

when posting anything that could be connected to Zyro Dynamics: Do not share confidential company information, internal communications, client names, product screenshots, or financial data on any social media platform. Do not make statements that could be interpreted as the official position of Zyro Dynamics unless expressly authorised by the Marketing team. Negative commentary or criticism of colleagues, management, or clients on social media is prohibited and may attract disciplinary action. When sharing professional opinions publicly, always include a personal disclaimer: Views expressed are my own and do not represent Zyro Dynamics. REPORTING VIOLATIONS Employees are encouraged and expected to report any suspected violations of this Code, without fear of retaliation. Reports may be made through any of the following channels: Channel Contact Confidentiality Reporting Manager

retaliation. Reports may be made through any of the following channels: Channel Contact Confidentiality Reporting Manager Direct communication or email Confidential HR Grievance Cell hr.grievance@acruxdynamics.com Strictly confidential Anonymous Whistleblower Portal whistle.acruxdynamics.com Fully anonymous Chief People Officer marta@acruxdynamics.com Confidential Note: Retaliation against an employee who raises a genuine concern in good faith is itself a violation of this Code and will be treated as a serious disciplinary matter.

Zyro Dynamics Pvt. Ltd. Performance Review Policy Doc Code: ZDL-HR-005 Confidential — For Internal Use Only Page 1 Zyro Dynamics Pvt. Ltd. Navigate the Future Performance Review Policy Document Code ZDL-HR-005 Version V.03 Effective Date 01 April 2025 Document Owner HR Department INTRODUCTION Zyro Dynamics believes that regular, structured, and honest performance conversations are essential to the growth of both the individual and the organisation. Our performance management framework is designed to help employees understand expectations clearly, receive meaningful feedback throughout the year, and be recognised and rewarded fairly for their contributions. This policy describes the review cycles, rating scales, goal-setting framework, and the process for managing performance that does not meet expectations. SCOPE AND APPLICABILITY

SCOPE AND APPLICABILITY This policy applies to all permanent and fixed-term contract employees at Zyro Dynamics. Probationary employees are subject to the Probation Review process described below. Interns and consultants are not covered under this policy but may receive informal feedback as part of their engagement.

Zyro Dynamics Pvt. Ltd. Performance Review Policy Doc Code: ZDL-HR-005 Confidential — For Internal Use Only Page 2 REVIEW CYCLES Review Type Frequency When Purpose Probation Review At Month 3 and Month 6 End of Month 3 and Month 6 Confirm, extend, or close probation Mid-Year Review (MYR) Annual September Progress check, goal refresh, coaching Annual Performance Review (APR) Annual March Final rating, increment, promotion decisions 360 Degree Feedback Annual February Peer, subordinate, and cross-functional feedback PIP Review Monthly during PIP period As applicable Track progress against improvement goals PERFORMANCE RATING SCALE Rating Label Description Approx. Distribution 5 Exceptional Consistently exceeds all goals; recognised as a role model within the team 5% 4 Exceeds Expectations Regularly surpasses targets and delivers beyond what is asked 20% 3 Meets Expectations

5% 4 Exceeds Expectations Regularly surpasses targets and delivers beyond what is asked 20% 3 Meets Expectations Reliably delivers against all assigned goals with good quality 55% 2 Partially Meets Expectations Meets some goals but falls short in key areas; improvement required 15% 1 Does Not Meet Expectations Fails to meet most goals; a Performance Improvement Plan will be considered 5% GOAL SETTING — OKR FRAMEWORK Zyro Dynamics uses the OKR (Objectives and Key Results) framework for goal setting at all levels of the organisation. Goals are set at the beginning of each financial year in April and must be documented in the ZyroHR portal by April 30. Objectives are 3 to 5 aspirational goals aligned to the team and company-level OKRs for the year. Key Results are 3 to 5 measurable outcomes per objective that define what success looks like in concrete terms.

Key Results are 3 to 5 measurable outcomes per objective that define what success looks like in concrete terms. Goals are mutually agreed between the employee and their reporting manager and cannot be set unilaterally by either party. Goals may be revised during the Mid-Year Review if there has been a significant shift in business priorities, with appropriate documentation.

Zyro Dynamics Pvt. Ltd. Performance Review Policy Doc Code: ZDL-HR-005 Confidential — For Internal Use Only Page 3 ANNUAL PERFORMANCE REVIEW PROCESS St ag e Activity Timeline Owner 1 360 degree feedback collected from peers and subordinates 1 to 20 February HR System 2 Employee self-assessment submitted on ZyroHR portal 1 to 10 March Employee 3 Manager completes assessment and submits draft rating 11 to 20 March Reporting Manager 4 Calibration meeting held with all L6 and above managers 21 to 25 March HR and L7+ Leaders 5 Final ratings locked and confirmed by HR 26 to 31 March HR 6 One-on-one feedback conversation between employee and manager 1 to 10 April Manager 7 Increment and promotion letters issued 15 April HR and Finance PERFORMANCE IMPROVEMENT PLAN (PIP)

Manager 7 Increment and promotion letters issued 15 April HR and Finance PERFORMANCE IMPROVEMENT PLAN (PIP) An employee who receives a rating of 1 or 2 in two consecutive review cycles will be placed on a formal Performance Improvement Plan. The PIP is a structured and time-bound programme aimed at giving the employee a fair opportunity to improve. PIP Structure Duration: 60 to 90 days, as determined by the reporting manager and HR Business Partner. At the start of the PIP, specific, measurable, and time-bound improvement targets are agreed and documented. Weekly check-in meetings between the employee and the manager are mandatory throughout the PIP period. The HR Business Partner will be present at all formal PIP review meetings and will maintain complete documentation of proceedings.

The HR Business Partner will be present at all formal PIP review meetings and will maintain complete documentation of proceedings. PIP Outcomes Successful completion: The employee exits the PIP and returns to the standard performance management cycle. Partial improvement: The PIP may be extended by up to 30 additional days at the joint discretion of HR and the manager. No improvement: The outcome may include a role change, demotion, or separation in accordance with the company's disciplinary and separation policy. PROMOTIONS Promotions at Zyro Dynamics are merit-based and are reviewed annually as part of the APR cycle.

PROMOTIONS Promotions at Zyro Dynamics are merit-based and are reviewed annually as part of the APR cycle. To be eligible for consideration, an employee must have completed a minimum of 12 months in their current grade, received a rating of 4 or 5 in the current Annual Performance Review, and demonstrated the competencies expected at the next grade level as assessed by the manager and calibration committee.

Zyro Dynamics Pvt. Ltd. Performance Review Policy Doc Code: ZDL-HR-005 Confidential — For Internal Use Only Page 4 above, promotions are also subject to the availability of an approved headcount position at the next grade. Note: Fulfilling the eligibility criteria does not guarantee a promotion. All promotion decisions are finalised by the calibration committee and are not subject to appeal.

Zyro Dynamics Pvt. Ltd. Compensation and Benefits Policy Doc Code: ZDL-HR-006 Confidential — For Internal Use Only Page 1 Zyro Dynamics Pvt. Ltd. Navigate the Future Compensation and Benefits Policy Document Code ZDL-HR-006 Version V.02 Effective Date 01 April 2025 Document Owner HR Department and Finance INTRODUCTION Zyro Dynamics is committed to providing all employees with a clear understanding of their compensation and benefits, and to maintaining a motivated, high-performing workforce by offering competitive rewards. The Company operates a compensation structure that aims to achieve fairness and equity for similar roles within the organisation, create appropriate differentials across grade levels, provide strong incentives for high performance, and remain competitive with the Indian IT product industry.

The Company operates a compensation structure that aims to achieve fairness and equity for similar roles within the organisation, create appropriate differentials across grade levels, provide strong incentives for high performance, and remain competitive with the Indian IT product industry. The confidentiality of individual compensation details and employment contract terms is to be strictly maintained at all times. Employees must not disclose their compensation to colleagues, as violations of this principle may attract disciplinary action. SALARY PAYMENT AND PAYROLL Salaries and professional fees are processed and credited to the employee's registered bank account by the 7th of the following month. Any changes to payment dates for a given month will be communicated to employees in advance by the Payroll team. Payroll Cut-Off Date The payroll cut-off date is the 24th of each month.

Payroll Cut-Off Date The payroll cut-off date is the 24th of each month. Any leave without pay, new joinings, or separations after the 24th will be adjusted in the subsequent month's payroll cycle. New employees joining after the 24th will still receive their salary for that month on the standard payday, with the salary calculated on a pro-rata basis.

Zyro Dynamics Pvt. Ltd. Compensation and Benefits Policy Doc Code: ZDL-HR-006 Confidential — For Internal Use Only Page 2 COMPONENTS OF REMUNERATION Component Percentage of CTC Frequency Tax Treatment Basic Salary 40% Monthly Fully taxable House Rent Allowance (HRA) 20% Monthly Partially exempt as per Income Tax Act Special Allowance 20% Monthly Fully taxable Performance Bonus 10% Annual, credited in April Fully taxable Provident Fund — Employer share 4.81% Monthly, credited to PF account Tax-free Gratuity — Employer provision 4.81% Paid on separation Exempt up to statutory limit Group Medical Insurance premium Approx. 0.38% Annual, paid by company Not a taxable perquisite SALARY DEDUCTIONS The Company may make deductions from an employee's salary in the following circumstances: Leave without pay in the current payroll period.

The Company may make deductions from an employee's salary in the following circumstances: Leave without pay in the current payroll period. Recovery of mistaken overpayment of salary from a previous period. Contributions towards statutory funds such as Provident Fund and ESIC, as applicable. Income tax deducted at source (TDS) based on the investment declarations submitted by the employee at the beginning of the financial year. Recovery of salary advances, loans, or equipment costs as per the agreement at the time of issuance. Recovery of notice pay shortfall in the event that an employee does not serve the full notice period on resignation. The Statutory Bonus may be included as a component in the CTC and paid monthly or on an annual basis between April and November of the following financial year. BENEFITS AND PERKS Health and Insurance Group Medical Insurance: Coverage of up to Rs. 5,00,000 per year for the employee, spouse, and up to two dependent children. Term Life Insurance: Coverage of 3 times the annual CTC for all permanent employees. Retirement Benefits

Term Life Insurance: Coverage of 3 times the annual CTC for all permanent employees. Retirement Benefits Provident Fund: Both the employee and the Company contribute 12% of the employee's basic salary each month to the PF account. This is managed by the Payroll team and credited as per EPFO guidelines. Gratuity: Payable to employees who have completed 5 or more years of continuous service, calculated and paid as per the Payment of Gratuity Act, 1972. Wellness and Lifestyle Annual Wellness Allowance of Rs. 1,000 per month for gym memberships, fitness apps, health check-ups, or mental health consultations. Employee Assistance Programme (EAP): Up to 6 free and confidential counselling sessions per year through the Company's EAP partner. Employee Stock Options (ESOP): Offered to employees at grade L5 and above, with a 4-year vesting schedule on a 1-year cliff basis.

Zyro Dynamics Pvt. Ltd. IT and Data Security Policy Doc Code: ZDL-IT-001 Confidential — For Internal Use Only Page 1 Zyro Dynamics Pvt. Ltd. Navigate the Future IT and Data Security Policy Document Code ZDL-IT-001 Version V.03 Effective Date 01 January 2025 Document Owner IT Infrastructure and Legal Compliance PURPOSE AND OBJECTIVE The purpose of this policy is to protect the confidentiality, integrity, and availability of all information assets owned, managed, or processed by Zyro Dynamics Pvt. This policy establishes the standards for acceptable use of company IT systems, data, and network infrastructure, and defines the responsibilities of all users in protecting these assets. SCOPE AND APPLICABILITY This policy applies to all employees, contractors, interns, vendors, and any third party who accesses Zyro Dynamics systems, networks, or data in any capacity.

This policy applies to all employees, contractors, interns, vendors, and any third party who accesses Zyro Dynamics systems, networks, or data in any capacity. It covers all company-owned and company-managed IT assets, including laptops, mobile devices, servers, cloud services, email systems, and network infrastructure, regardless of the physical location from which they are accessed. ACCEPTABLE USE OF IT ASSETS Company Devices Company-issued devices, including laptops, mobile phones, and peripherals, are provided primarily for business use. Incidental personal use during non-business hours is permitted provided it does not interfere with work performance.

Zyro Dynamics Pvt. Ltd. IT and Data Security Policy Doc Code: ZDL-IT-001 Confidential — For Internal Use Only Page 2 Installing software on a company device without prior approval from the IT team is strictly prohibited. All software requests must be raised through the ZyroDesk helpdesk portal. Company devices must not be used to access, download, or store inappropriate content, including adult material, pirated media, or illegal software. Any lost or stolen company device must be reported to IT Security immediately at security@zyrodyn amics.com so that the device can be remotely wiped and access credentials revoked. Internet and Network Usage Corporate internet access may be used for moderate personal browsing during non-working hours. High-bandwidth streaming, torrenting, and accessing prohibited websites are not permitted at any time on the corporate network.

High-bandwidth streaming, torrenting, and accessing prohibited websites are not permitted at any time on the corporate network. All internet traffic on the Zyro Dynamics network is monitored and logged for security and compliance purposes. Employees should have no expectation of personal privacy when using company network resources. Accessing company systems over public Wi-Fi is strictly prohibited without an active VPN connection. PASSWORD AND ACCESS MANAGEMENT Requirement Standard Minimum password length 12 characters Password complexity Must contain uppercase letters, lowercase letters, at least one number, and one special character Password expiry Every 90 days Multi-factor authentication (MFA) Mandatory for all company systems without exception Password reuse The last 12 passwords may not be reused Sharing of credentials Strictly prohibited; attracts immediate disciplinary action

Minimum password length 12 characters Password complexity Must contain uppercase letters, lowercase letters, at least one number, and one special character Password expiry Every 90 days Multi-factor authentication (MFA) Mandatory for all company systems without exception Password reuse The last 12 passwords may not be reused Sharing of credentials Strictly prohibited; attracts immediate disciplinary action DATA CLASSIFICATION All information assets at Zyro Dynamics are classified into one of four levels. Employees must handle information according to its classification level at all times. Classification Description Examples Handling Requirement Public Information approved for external distribution Product brochures, press releases, job postings No restriction Internal Information for employee use only Internal memos, org charts, policies Do not share outside company Confidential

Internal Information for employee use only Internal memos, org charts, policies Do not share outside company Confidential Sensitive business or customer information Customer data, financial reports, source code Encrypted; access-controlled; need-to-know only Restricted Highest sensitivity; strictly limited access Credentials, PII, security configurations, trade secrets Access only for specifically authorised individuals

Zyro Dynamics Pvt. Ltd. IT and Data Security Policy Doc Code: ZDL-IT-001 Confidential — For Internal Use Only Page 3 REMOTE WORK SECURITY VPN must be active at all times when accessing Zyro Dynamics systems from outside the office network. Home routers must be secured with WPA2 or WPA3 encryption and a strong, unique password. Screen lock must activate automatically after a maximum of 5 minutes of inactivity on any company device. Confidential documents must not be printed at home, in a co-working space, or in any public environment. Zyro Dynamics reserves the right to remotely lock or wipe any company device that is reported stolen, lost, or believed to be compromised, without prior notice. BRING YOUR OWN DEVICE (BYOD)

BRING YOUR OWN DEVICE (BYOD) Employees who wish to use a personal device to access Zyro Dynamics systems must register the device with the IT team and have the company's Mobile Device Management (MDM) profile installed. Personal devices used for work must comply with all password, encryption, and VPN requirements set out in this policy. The Company reserves the right to remotely wipe company data from any registered personal device. INCIDENT REPORTING Any actual or suspected security incident, including data loss, malware infection, phishing, unauthorised access, or device loss, must be reported to the IT Security team without delay at security@zyrodyn amics.com. Timely reporting is critical to minimising damage. Employees who fail to report a known or suspected incident may be held accountable for the resulting harm. Incident Type Report To Response Timeline

Employees who fail to report a known or suspected incident may be held accountable for the resulting harm. Incident Type Report To Response Timeline Phishing or suspicious email security@zyrodyn amics.com Immediately Malware or suspicious device behaviour IT Helpdesk and IT Security Within 1 hour Data breach or suspected leak CISO, Legal, and HR Within 2 hours Lost or stolen device IT and HR Within 4 hours Suspected unauthorised access IT Security and reporting manager Immediately

Zyro Dynamics Pvt. Ltd. POSH Policy Doc Code: ZDL-HR-007 Confidential — For Internal Use Only Page 1 Zyro Dynamics Pvt. Ltd. Navigate the Future Prevention of Sexual Harassment (POSH) Policy Document Code ZDL-HR-007 Version V.02 Effective Date 01 January 2025 Document Owner Internal Complaints Committee (ICC) and HR INTRODUCTION Zyro Dynamics is committed to securing and maintaining a work environment free from harassment, exploitation, and intimidation for all employees. While the Company will take every required step to maintain a harmonious and respectful workplace, employees are also personally responsible for contributing to an environment in which dignity is respected and upheld.

While the Company will take every required step to maintain a harmonious and respectful workplace, employees are also personally responsible for contributing to an environment in which dignity is respected and upheld. This Prevention of Sexual Harassment (POSH) Policy has been developed in accordance with the Sexual Harassment of Women at Workplace (Prevention, Prohibition and Redressal) Act, 2013, and the rules framed thereunder. It reflects the Company's firm commitment to preventing sexual harassment and providing a fair, confidential, and effective mechanism for redressal. OBJECTIVE The objective of this policy is to provide protection against sexual harassment at the workplace, to prevent the occurrence of such harassment, and to provide an accessible and fair mechanism for the redressal of complaints relating to sexual harassment at Zyro Dynamics.

Zyro Dynamics Pvt. Ltd. POSH Policy Doc Code: ZDL-HR-007 Confidential — For Internal Use Only Page 2 SCOPE AND APPLICABILITY This policy applies to all employees of Zyro Dynamics, including full-time, fixed-term, probationary, and contractual employees, as well as interns, trainees, and third-party personnel working at Zyro Dynamics premises. It covers conduct at all company workplaces, which includes: All Zyro Dynamics offices and premises in India and abroad. Any location where work-related activities are being performed, including client sites and co-working spaces. Social, business, or professional functions organised by or on behalf of Zyro Dynamics. Any location visited by an employee during the course of their work, including while travelling on company business.

Any location visited by an employee during the course of their work, including while travelling on company business. Digital channels including email, chat applications, social media, and phone communications that are connected to the workplace relationship. DEFINITION OF SEXUAL HARASSMENT Sexual harassment includes any one or more of the following unwelcome acts or behaviour, whether directly or by implication: Physical contact or advances of a sexual nature. Demands or requests for sexual favours, whether explicit or implied, in exchange for any work-related benefit. Making sexually coloured remarks, gestures, or jokes. Showing pornography or sharing sexually explicit content through any medium. Any other unwelcome physical, verbal, or non-verbal conduct of a sexual nature. The following circumstances, even if not directly sexual in nature, may also amount to sexual harassment when

The following circumstances, even if not directly sexual in nature, may also amount to sexual harassment when connected to the workplace relationship: An implied or explicit promise of preferential treatment in employment. An implied or explicit threat of detrimental treatment or adverse impact on employment status. Conduct that creates an intimidating, offensive, or hostile work environment. Humiliating treatment that is likely to affect the physical or mental health or safety of the person. INTERNAL COMPLAINTS COMMITTEE (ICC) Zyro Dynamics has constituted an Internal Complaints Committee as required under the POSH Act. The ICC is responsible for receiving, inquiring into, and recommending action on all complaints of sexual harassment. Role Name Department Presiding Officer Marta Chief People Officer Internal Member Pooja Ramachandran Legal and Compliance Internal Member Aryan Kapoor

Role Name Department Presiding Officer Marta Chief People Officer Internal Member Pooja Ramachandran Legal and Compliance Internal Member Aryan Kapoor Engineering Manager, L6 External Member Adv. Preethi Srinivas External — Women's Rights Organisation Note: The ICC contact email is icc@zyrodyn amics.com. Complaints may also be submitted in a sealed envelope addressed to the Presiding Officer at the HR office at Zyro Dynamics HQ.

Zyro Dynamics Pvt. Ltd. POSH Policy Doc Code: ZDL-HR-007 Confidential — For Internal Use Only Page 3 FILING A COMPLAINT Any aggrieved person who has experienced sexual harassment may file a complaint with the ICC within 3 months of the incident or the last incident in a series of incidents. In exceptional circumstances, the ICC may extend this period by a further 3 months upon written application with reasons. Ste p Action Timeline 1 Aggrieved person submits written complaint to the ICC by email or sealed letter Within 3 months of incident 2 ICC acknowledges receipt and forwards a copy to the respondent Within 7 working days 3 Respondent is given opportunity to submit a written response 10 working days to respond 4 ICC conducts inquiry — hearings of both parties, witnesses, and evidence review Completed within 60 days 5

4 ICC conducts inquiry — hearings of both parties, witnesses, and evidence review Completed within 60 days 5 ICC submits inquiry report with recommendations to management Within 10 days of inquiry completion 6 Management implements recommended action Within 60 days of receiving report CONFIDENTIALITY The identities of the complainant, the respondent, and any witnesses, as well as all proceedings, findings, and recommendations of the ICC, are strictly confidential. No information shall be communicated to any person other than those directly involved in the inquiry process or those required to implement the recommendations. Any breach of confidentiality by any party is itself a disciplinary offence. PROTECTION FROM RETALIATION

Any breach of confidentiality by any party is itself a disciplinary offence. PROTECTION FROM RETALIATION Zyro Dynamics expressly prohibits any form of retaliation against an employee who files a complaint, participates in an inquiry, or reports a suspected violation under this policy in good faith. Any retaliatory act, including adverse performance ratings, demotion, transfer, isolation, threats, or termination, will be treated as a separate and serious disciplinary matter independent of the original complaint. CONSEQUENCES On the basis of the ICC's findings and recommendations, the Company may impose the following actions on the respondent, depending on the gravity of the proven misconduct: Written warning with mandatory completion of a sensitisation and inclusion training programme. Suspension without pay for a defined period. Transfer to a different team, project, or location.

Suspension without pay for a defined period. Transfer to a different team, project, or location. Withholding of promotion, increment, or other benefits for a specified period. Termination of employment with immediate effect. Referral to law enforcement where the conduct is found to constitute a criminal offence under applicable Indian law.

Zyro Dynamics Pvt. Ltd. Onboarding and Separation Policy Doc Code: ZDL-HR-008 Confidential — For Internal Use Only Page 1 Zyro Dynamics Pvt. Ltd. Navigate the Future Onboarding and Separation Policy Document Code ZDL-HR-008 Version V.02 Effective Date 01 April 2025 Document Owner HR Department INTRODUCTION Zyro Dynamics has documented this Onboarding and Separation Policy to ensure that both the joining experience and the exit process are handled in a structured, professional, and compassionate manner. The Company believes that the quality of a new employee's first 90 days has a lasting impact on their performance and engagement. Equally, a well-managed separation reflects the Company's respect for the individual and supports a smooth transition for the team that remains. Pre-Joining Activities

Zyro Dynamics Pvt. Ltd. Onboarding and Separation Policy Doc Code: ZDL-HR-008 Confidential — For Internal Use Only Page 2 Activity Owner Timeline Issue offer letter and appointment letter HR Upon offer acceptance Collect joining documents: education, identity, and experience proof HR 7 days before joining Initiate background and reference verification HR / Agency 7 days before joining Provision laptop and grant system access IT 2 working days before joining Allocate workstation for office-based roles Admin Day before joining Send welcome email with Day 1 schedule and reporting instructions HR Day before joining The 90-Day Onboarding Programme Phase Duration Focus Areas Orientation Week 1 (Days 1 to 5) Company culture, team introductions, tools setup, HR and IT induction sessions Role Ramp-Up

Duration Focus Areas Orientation Week 1 (Days 1 to 5) Company culture, team introductions, tools setup, HR and IT induction sessions Role Ramp-Up Weeks 2 to 4 (Days 6 to 30) Role-specific training, mentoring, shadowing senior colleagues, first assignments Independent Contribution Month 2 (Days 31 to 60) Owning assigned tasks, first deliverables, 30-day check-in with reporting manager Full Productivity Month 3 (Days 61 to 90) Full ownership of role responsibilities, 60-day and 90-day formal manager reviews Probation Period All new employees, with the exception of those joining at grade L7 and above, are subject to a probation period of 6 months starting from their date of joining. A formal probation review is conducted at the end of Month 3 and Month 6. Successful completion of probation is confirmed in writing by HR.

A formal probation review is conducted at the end of Month 3 and Month 6. Successful completion of probation is confirmed in writing by HR. Benefits including ESOP eligibility and full leave accrual commence from the date probation is confirmed. Note: The probation period may be extended by up to 3 months if performance has not met the expected standard during the initial period. This will be communicated in writing to the employee. PART B — VOLUNTARY SEPARATION / RESIGNATION An employee may terminate their employment with the Company by giving written notice to their reporting manager and HR as per the notice period applicable to their grade. Notice must be submitted through the ZyroHR portal and confirmed by HR in writing. Grade Notice Period Notice Period Buyout

Notice must be submitted through the ZyroHR portal and confirmed by HR in writing. Grade Notice Period Notice Period Buyout L1 to L3 30 days Not available L4 to L6 60 days Available at the Company's discretion L7 to L9 90 days Available at the Company's discretion L10 (C-Suite) 90 days As per individual employment contract

Zyro Dynamics Pvt. Ltd. Onboarding and Separation Policy Doc Code: ZDL-HR-008 Confidential — For Internal Use Only Page 3 Employees are not entitled to avail or adjust accrued leave during the notice period unless specifically approved by the reporting manager and HR. Where both parties agree to shorten the notice period, the salary paid will correspond to the actual notice period served. Where a mutual agreement has not been reached and the employee does not complete the full notice period, the Company will recover a sum equivalent to the salary for the shortfall period. PART C — INVOLUNTARY SEPARATION The Company may terminate an employee's services in the following circumstances: Failure to meet performance standards over a sustained period, including unsuccessful completion of a Performance Improvement Plan.

Failure to meet performance standards over a sustained period, including unsuccessful completion of a Performance Improvement Plan. Gross or wilful misconduct, serious violation of any company policy, or unethical conduct as determined through the disciplinary process. Redundancy or restructuring, where the role is eliminated as a result of organisational changes. An employee whose employment is terminated on the grounds of wilful misconduct or unethical conduct will not be entitled to any payment in lieu of notice. The Company will follow applicable Indian labour law provisions for all cases of involuntary separation. PART D — RETIREMENT The normal retirement age for all employees of Zyro Dynamics shall be 58 years.

PART D — RETIREMENT The normal retirement age for all employees of Zyro Dynamics shall be 58 years. The date of birth recorded with the Company at the time of employment shall be treated as the sole valid evidence of age for all matters pertaining to service and retirement. Any additional age proof submitted at the time of retirement will not be considered. Finance 3 days before last working day Attend exit interview with HR HR Final week of employment Receive experience letter HR Within 7 working days of last working day Receive relieving letter HR After Full and Final settlement is processed

Zyro Dynamics Pvt. Ltd. Onboarding and Separation Policy Doc Code: ZDL-HR-008 Confidential — For Internal Use Only Page 4 Full and Final Settlement Full and Final Settlement is processed within 30 days of the employee's last working day and includes: outstanding salary for days worked in the final month; encashment of remaining Earned Leave balance; pro-rated performance bonus where applicable; Gratuity for employees with 5 or more years of continuous service; and processing of vested ESOP shares. Any outstanding dues owed to the Company will be recovered from the F&F; amount.

Zyro Dynamics Pvt. Ltd. Travel and Expense Policy Doc Code: ZDL-FIN-001 Confidential — For Internal Use Only Page 1 Zyro Dynamics Pvt. Ltd. Navigate the Future Travel and Expense Policy Document Code ZDL-FIN-001 Version V.03 Effective Date 01 April 2025 Document Owner Finance and HR Department INTRODUCTION Zyro Dynamics requires employees to travel from time to time for client meetings, conferences, inter-office work, and other business needs. This policy governs all business-related travel and expense reimbursements to ensure that travel is planned cost-effectively, expenses are legitimate and well-documented, and reimbursements are processed promptly and fairly. All travel must be pre-approved, and all expense claims must be supported by valid documentation. SCOPE AND APPLICABILITY

All travel must be pre-approved, and all expense claims must be supported by valid documentation. SCOPE AND APPLICABILITY This policy applies to all permanent and fixed-term contract employees of Zyro Dynamics who travel for official business purposes. Interns and consultants who are required to travel for work must obtain prior approval from their respective engagement manager and HR before any travel is undertaken.

Zyro Dynamics Pvt. Ltd. Travel and Expense Policy Doc Code: ZDL-FIN-001 Confidential — For Internal Use Only Page 3 ELIGIBLE AND NON-ELIGIBLE EXPENSES Category Eligible Not Eligible Flights Economy or business as applicable to grade; within policy limit Upgrades beyond grade entitlement; personal travel segments Accommodation Business hotels within the per-night rate limit Luxury suites; personal extensions of stay beyond business requirement Meals Up to the daily allowance limit with valid receipts Alcoholic beverages; meals for personal guests Ground transport Cab or taxi to airport and to client locations Personal trips; sightseeing; leisure travel Roaming and calls International roaming for documented business calls Personal calls; streaming; entertainment Laundry For trips exceeding 4 nights Trips of 4 nights or fewer TRAVEL ADVANCE

Laundry For trips exceeding 4 nights Trips of 4 nights or fewer TRAVEL ADVANCE Employees may request a travel advance of up to 80% of the estimated total trip cost. The advance request must be raised through the ZyroHR portal at least 5 working days before the travel date. Any portion of the advance that is unused must be returned to Finance within 7 working days of returning from the trip. Failure to submit an expense report or return the unused advance within 30 calendar days of return will result in automatic recovery of the full advance from the employee's salary. EXPENSE SUBMISSION AND REIMBURSEMENT All individual expenses above Rs. 500 must be supported by an original receipt, GST invoice, or valid digital invoice. Expenses without supporting documents will not be reimbursed. Expense reports must be submitted through the ZyroHR portal within 7 working days of the return date.

Expense reports must be submitted through the ZyroHR portal within 7 working days of the return date. Reports submitted after 30 calendar days will not be processed regardless of the reason. Foreign currency expenses will be reimbursed in Indian Rupees at the RBI reference exchange rate applicable on the date of the expense. Expenses exceeding the stated policy limits will not be reimbursed unless a prior written exception has been approved by the Finance Controller. Expense reports approved and submitted by the 20th of a month will be reimbursed with the same month's payroll cycle.
